title: psychotria albiflora
intro: Psychotria albiflora, also known as the white-flowered shrub or white-flowered psychotria, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria albiflora are numerous and include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections. Psychotria albiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and interactions.
